scenario: Married filing jointly both spouses age 65+ with pension and interest income — tests dual senior standard deduction ($34,700 = $31,500 base + $1,600 × 2 age factors)
source: IRS Pub 17 TY2025, Table 10-2 standard deduction MFJ with 2 boxes checked; Rev. Proc. 2024-40 §3.14: $1,600 per age/blindness factor for MFJ (p. 95)
